---
title: "generate_cli_action"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L25)

# `generate_cli_action()`

Generate CLI actions

## Usage

```r
generate_cli_action(x, word)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | input to test against |
| `word` | the key word to validate |

## Value

list
